results.rendered_html:
1. apraśasta (3. a + pra˚ von śaṃs) adj.
1〉 ruhmlos, des Lobes entbehrend, dem ein Makel anhängt: apraśastā iva smasi praśastimamba naskṛdhi  ṚV. 2,41,6 . viśvasmātsīmadhamā~ indra dasyūnviśo dāsīrakṛṇorapraśastāḥ 4,28,4 . vibhītakaścāpraśastaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ kalisaṃśrayāt  N. (BOPP) 20,41 .
— 2〉 nicht gutgeheissen, verboten: apraśastaṃ niśi snānaṃ rāhoranyatra darśanāt  PARĀŚ. _im_ ŚKDR.  apraśastaṃ (was nicht inʼs Wasser geworfen werden darf) tu kṛtvāpsu  M. 11,255 .

results.rendered_html:
apraśasta a.
1 Not praiseworthy, worthless, contemptible.
2 Not approved, forbidden.
3 (Ved.) Disobedient.
4 Less, deficient, decayed (kṣīṇa).
